news.headline: XTransfer and Ouribank partner to enhance cross-border trade in Brazil, reducing costs and boosting businesses.
news.summary: A partnership has been established between XTransfer, a top global B2B Cross-Border Trade Payment Platform, and Ouribank, a prominent foreign exchange bank in Brazil. The collaboration between these industry leaders seeks to enhance efficiency and cut costs in international trade transactions. This agreement, announced on March 13, 2025, signifies a significant move towards streamlining cross-border payment processes. XTransfer, known as China's premier platform for B2B trade payments, is teaming up with Ouribank, a respected financial institution in Brazil, to improve the facilitation of international trade. This strategic partnership is expected to benefit businesses by providing more seamless and cost-effective payment solutions for transactions between China and Brazil.

news.headline: Metagenomi reports in Nature Communications success in integrating large genes in human cells using compact CAST system.
news.summary: Successfully integrated a significant therapeutic gene into human cell genomes using the compact CAST system, hitting the targeted integration goal. This breakthrough is a significant step forward for gene editing technology and has the potential to revolutionize treatment for various diseases.

news.headline: USDC, USDt stablecoins gain popularity in Latin America, with 39% of Bitso purchases in 2024; BTC trading drops to 22%.
news.summary: The adoption of stablecoins in Latin America is on the rise, with Circle’s USDC and Tether’s USDT being popular choices for financial stability. A report by Bitso revealed that stablecoins accounted for 39% of total purchases on the platform in 2024, marking a 9% increase from the previous year. USDC led the race at 24%, followed by USDT at 15%. In contrast, Bitcoin saw a decline in trading volume, dropping to 22% from 38% in 2023, reflecting a growing trend of hodling. Argentina stood out as a top market for USDT with a 50% share, driven by high inflation rates. Meanwhile, Brazilian and Mexican users continued to favor Bitcoin as the most purchased crypto asset. The report underscores stablecoins’ appeal in the region amidst challenging macroeconomic conditions.

news.headline: Amcor's subsidiary prices private offering of $2.2 billion in senior unsecured notes.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) revealed that its subsidiary Amcor Flexibles North America, Inc. ("AFNA") had set the price for a private offering of guaranteed senior notes. The Offering will involve an aggregate principal amount...

Euna Solutions report shows need for modernization in grants management due to resource constraints, focusing on tech impact.
news.summary: Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of specialized SaaS solutions for the public sector, unveiled its State of Grants Management and Technology Report 2025. This report provides a detailed examination of the shifting grants environment and the growing influence of technology in enhancing effectiveness, adherence, and funding achievements for public sector entities. According to Tom Amburgey, there is significant transformation occurring in the grants sector.

Company's strategy gets a major revamp with sales soaring by 20% in Q3, leading to a 15% increase in profits.
Scatec signs 25-year USD-denominated PPA with Egypt Aluminium for 1.1 GW Solar PV + 100 MW/200MWh BESS project.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Oslo and Cairo, a prominent renewable energy company named Scatec ASA agreed to a 25-year corporate Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with Egypt Aluminium. This deal, valued in USD, pertains to a substantial project involving a 1.1 gigawatt Solar PV coupled with a 100 megawatt/200 megawatt-hour Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in Egypt. This initiative is supported by a sovereign guarantee.

German Greens Official: We continue to reject the draft legislation of the CDU and SPD.

news.summary: Denver-based Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), a public REIT specializing in acquiring industrial manufacturing real estate, revealed it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4609375 per share on its 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock for Q1 2025. The dividend announcement marks the consistent focus of the Company on rewarding its investors, specifically those holding the Series A Preferred Stock.

news.headline: Walker & Dunlop expands Investment Sales team in Phoenix with new managing director, Christopher Westcott. Phoenix part of coordinated Western U.S. growth effort. Christopher will focus on multifamily investment sales in Arizona.
news.summary: Walker & Dunlop, Inc., headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, has expanded its Investment Sales team by hiring Christopher Westcott as managing director in Phoenix, Arizona. This strategic move is part of the company's growth initiative in the mountain and Western U.S. regions, including Denver, Southern California, and Phoenix. Westcott will specialize in multifamily investment sales in Arizona, contributing to the company's overall goal of increasing its presence in key markets.

news.headline: Cyber Guru acquires Mantra to redefine cybersecurity awareness landscape, strengthening employee resilience against cyber threats.
news.summary: In Rome and Paris, Cyber Guru, a top cybersecurity training platform, has acquired Mantra, a key player in advanced cybersecurity awareness solutions. This merger combines the strengths of both companies to enhance employee awareness and resilience against cyber threats, aiding organizations in bolstering their defense against attacks. The acquisition aims to leverage the expertise and resources of Cyber Guru and Mantra to further the mission of strengthening cybersecurity. This strategic move is set to positively impact the cybersecurity landscape by providing enhanced solutions in the ever-evolving digital threat landscape, consolidating their position in the market.

news.headline: Davis Oral Surgery & Implant Center welcomes Dr. Pouya Namiranian & Dr. Amir Nojoumi, highly skilled oral surgeons.
news.summary: Davis Oral Surgery and Implant Center in Davis, California revealed the incorporation of two experienced oral surgeons, Dr. Pouya Namiranian and Dr. Amir Nojoumi, on March 12, 2025. This addition aims to enhance their practice with a focus on providing exceptional care. Dr. Namiranian and Dr. Nojoumi are set to bring significant expertise to the team.

news.headline: U.S. Energy Corp. reported 2024 full-year financials, with revenue at $20.6M, generating $13.5M from asset divestments. They had daily production averaging 1,136 Boe/d. Operating expenses decreased by 27%. Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 reached $3.6M, with a net loss of $25.8M due to impairment and asset sale losses. They ended the year with $7.7M cash and completed a $12.1M equity raise. Share repurchases totaled 1.67M shares at an average price of $1.73/share, representing 4.9% of outstanding shares. In Q4 2024, they reported $4.2M in revenue, with $0.4M EBITDA. Production averaged 971 Boe/d. Full-year 2024 production saw a significant decrease compared to 2023, with oil sales down by 36%. The company is focusing on developing industrial gas assets in Montana. Further details can be found on their website.
news.summary: U.S. Energy Corporation reported its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. In 2024, the company divested non-core assets, generating $13.5 million in sales proceeds for projects and shareholder returns. Total daily production averaged 1,136 Boe/d with revenue of $20.6 million. They reported a $3.6 million Adjusted EBITDA, ended the year with $7.7 million in cash, and completed an equity offering for $12.1 million. Management emphasized their strategic roadmap for growth in industrial gas and carbon sequestration initiatives. The company also detailed plans for development activities in Montana for 2025. Overall, U.S. Energy is moving towards sustainable growth with a strong balance sheet, no debt, and a focus on generating shareholder value. On a yearly comparison, there was a significant decrease in revenue and production volumes primarily due to asset divestments and lower commodity prices. Adjusted EBITDA was positive despite a net loss of $25.8 million. The company's reserves proved reserves were 2.0 MBoe at year-end 2024, and the PV-10 value was $29.1 million. U.S. Energy also highlighted the completion of a public equity offering, share repurchase activities, and ongoing commitment to reducing carbon footprint, aiming for sustainable development and shareholder returns.

news.headline: Global Industrial Grade Octadecanamide Market valued at USD 146.6 million in 2024, set to reach USD 263.9 million by 2035 with a CAGR of 5.5%. Key growth areas include packaging, automotive, and construction sectors, with North America holding a significant market share and creating a $40.1 million opportunity by 2035. The compound's versatility in polymer processing and eco-friendly manufacturing processes are driving market expansion.
news.summary: The global Industrial Grade Octadecanamide Market was worth USD 146.6 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.5% to reach USD 263.9 million by 2035. This compound is crucial in modern manufacturing, particularly in the packaging and automotive sectors due to its slip and anti-blocking properties. The market is seeing advancements in eco-friendly manufacturing and bio-based alternatives. Additionally, there is a rising demand for modified materials in construction and applications in agriculture and automotive industries. North America is a key region in this market, projected to hold a 1% market share by 2035 and offer a $40.1 million opportunity. The growth is driven by increasing demand in polymer processing, lubricants, and coatings industries, as well as sustainable production technologies.

news.headline: WTW appoints Massimo Cavadini as Head of Product, Pricing, Claims, Underwriting for Continental Europe, focusing on expanding solutions for insurers.
news.summary: Increase in consulting and software offerings aimed at insurance companies has been announced, reflecting a growth of services in the sector. The expansion covers a wide range of tailored solutions for insurers, including software packages and consulting services. This initiative showcases a significant increase in offerings, with a rise of over 25% in the number of solutions provided compared to the previous year. The move indicates a strategic focus on catering to the specific needs of the insurance industry and enhancing their operational efficiency.

news.headline: Nokia partners with Vodafone Idea in India to modernize IP backhaul network with advanced solutions in a 3-year deal.
news.summary: On Thursday, Nokia Corporation (NYSE:NOK) announced that Vodafone Idea Limited (VIL), a joint venture between Aditya Birla Group and Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD), has selected Nokia to improve and expand its IP backhaul network in India. Under a three-year contract, Nokia will implement its advanced IP/MPLS solutions in various telecom circles. This deployment includes the latest IP/MPLS products such as the 7750 SR and 7250 IXR series to upgrade VIL's transport network, increasing scalability and connectivity for both mobile and enterprise services. VIL's objective is to enhance...

news.headline: MEXC data: Memecoins accounted for nearly 50% of new token listings in Feb amid market volatility.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on March 13, 2025, MEXC, a top global cryptocurrency exchange, disclosed data on token listings and trading in January and February. The report emphasized significant market interest in new tokens, notably memecoins, amidst general market unpredictability. The data showcases a high demand for new tokens, reflecting the market's resilience to volatility.

news.headline: Nobu Hotel Toronto opening in June 2025, accepting reservations now. Expanding presence in Canada.
news.summary: The upcoming Nobu Hotel Toronto is scheduled to begin accommodating guests in June 2025 and has commenced taking reservations, featuring a special grand opening promotion. This announcement was made on March 13, 2025. The hotel is highly anticipated following the popular launch of its restaurant in Toronto, building on its reputation for excellence.

news.headline: TX Stock Exchange hires ETP leaders to drive $11 trillion market expansion, strengthens management team.
news.summary: Today, the Texas Stock Exchange (TXSE) in Dallas revealed the recruitment of experienced professionals to bolster its leadership team. The goal is to expand its presence in the Exchange-Traded Products (ETP) market, which is valued at $11 trillion. This move is part of TXSE's efforts to enhance its operations and solidify its position in the industry.

news.headline: MRI Software recognized on G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for Real Estate, showcasing industry-leading innovation for clients.
news.summary: A leading PropTech company, MRI Software, headquartered in SOLON, Ohio, revealed today that it has secured a spot in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for Best Real Estate solutions. The firm continues its global expansion, providing industry-leading innovations for clients worldwide.

news.headline: Blackstone wins 2025 Hunt Scanlon 'Excellence in Culture' Award for workplace culture excellence.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that Blackstone has been awarded the prestigious 'Excellence in Culture' Award for 2025 by Hunt Scanlon Media. This award, granted in Greenwich, Conn. on March 13, 2025, highlights companies that have demonstrated exceptional commitment to nurturing a positive and progressive work environment. Blackstone's outstanding efforts in cultivating a strong company culture have earned them this esteemed accolade. The recognition underscores their dedication to fostering a workplace that values and supports its employees.

news.headline: Noah Holdings to unveil Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 25, 2025. (Source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Shanghai, Noah Holdings Limited, a prominent wealth management service provider catering to Mandarin speakers, known as Noah, announced its status as a pioneer in the industry. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NOAH and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as 6686. Noah specializes in offering comprehensive advisory services on global investment and asset allocation, distinguishing itself as a leader in the field.

news.headline: Marine Toys for Tots Literacy Program launches "March into Reading" initiative to promote literacy in low-income communities.
news.summary: In Triangle, Virginia on March 13, 2025, it was announced that the Marine Toys for Tots Literacy Program is dedicated to enhancing children's access to books and educational materials in low-income areas during National Reading Month. Their campaign, "March into Reading," underscores their commitment to this cause.

news.headline: 2025 AADOCR Delta Dental Institute Oral Health Equity Research Award winners are named: Heidi Longi, DMD, Jeri Bullock, DDS, and Kristin Hoeft, PhD from University of Utah and University of California.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Washington, the American Association for Dental, Oral, and Craniofacial Research (AADOCR) and the Delta Dental Institute (DDI) announced that Heidi Longi, DMD, and Jeri Bullock, DDS, from the University of Utah, along with Kristin Hoeft, PhD, from the University of California, have been recognized for their contributions to the field.

news.headline: IntellaTriage, a top provider of nurse-first triage solutions, promoted key leaders to drive growth in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, IntellaTriage, a prominent provider of after-hours nurse-first triage solutions, kicked off the year by announcing promotions for multiple important individuals within the company. news.summary: The AORN Global Surgical Conference & Expo, a leading event for perioperative nurses and the surgical team, is scheduled for April 5-8, 2025, in Boston, Massachusetts. The conference offers advanced education and showcases the newest innovations in the field.

news.headline: Century Casinos, Inc. reports Q4 & full Year 2024 results, anticipates growth in 2025 with opening of new Missouri casino.
news.summary: Exciting prospects are on the horizon for 2025 following the inauguration of a new land-based casino in Missouri. Located in Colorado Springs, this development is set to make a significant impact. Century Casinos, Inc. revealed their financial performance for the recent quarter and year, marking a positive trajectory for the company. Trading under Nasdaq Capital Market® as CNTY, they are poised for growth and success in the upcoming years.

news.headline: 47% of large-company executives comfortable with AI agents for customers; 70% approve AI planning travel, 14% for air traffic control.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted in New York, it was found that 70% of individuals approve of using agentic AI for planning and booking travel arrangements. However, only 14% expressed comfort with the idea of AI being responsible for air traffic control. The study was released by NLX, an AI platform known for enhancing conversational interactions for top global brands.

news.headline: Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) plans up to US$30 million in new share repurchase program. Leading Bitcoin company in China.
news.summary: In Shanghai on March 13, 2025, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) revealed a new share repurchase program approved by its board of directors. As a prominent Bitcoin mining firm and automotive transaction service provider in China, Cango aims to enhance shareholder value through this initiative. The program underscores the company's commitment to growth and financial stability in the industry. This move reflects Cango's strong position in the market, illustrating its strategic approach towards maximizing shareholder returns.

news.headline: Verano expands Savvy™ and Essence™ portfolios with large-format vapes and pre-rolls for growth in cannabis markets.
news.summary: Four new products, Extra Savvy, Savvy Strut, Savvy 100 Proof, and Essence J's, have been launched. They offer large-format vapes and barrel-style pre-rolls with built-in digital engagement features. These products aim to provide quality, convenience, and affordability to consumers.

news.headline: RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT) to present at 35th Oppenheimer Healthcare MedTech & Services Conference on March 17, 2025 at 12:40pm ET.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, RadNet, Inc. disclosed that Mark Stolper, their Executive Vice President and CEO, will be speaking at the 35th Oppenheimer Healthcare MedTech & Services Conference on March 17, 2025, at 12:40 p.m. Eastern Time. RadNet, Inc., a prominent provider of diagnostic imaging services across the nation, operates through a network of outpatient imaging centers. The presentation will occur virtually, accessible to attendees online. The company is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RDNT.

news.headline: 1 in 4 Americans spend at least $100/month on streaming; study of 5,000 subscribers shows how they cut costs.
news.summary: A recent influential study conducted on 5,000 American subscribers has shed light on the evolving landscape of the US subscription economy. The research uncovered that adept subscribers are effectively managing their expenses by consolidating and combining their bills. This highlights a growing trend in the way individuals are handling their subscriptions in the country.

news.headline: Radware will open a new data center in Lima, Peru, offering top security against cyberattacks to local customers.
news.summary: Designed to offer top-tier security against application and network attacks, a new structure has been constructed to cater to local clients. The building boasts state-of-the-art technology and is equipped to defend against a wide range of cyber threats. This initiative aims to provide protection to businesses and organizations in the area, with an investment of over $5 million to ensure the highest level of security possible. The facility is a significant step towards safeguarding against potential cyber risks and ensuring a secure environment for users.

news.summary: Three new locations of Next Health will be opening in Houston, offering advanced health optimization and longevity services beginning in 2025. The expansion is part of the company's commitment to provide innovative biohacking solutions to a wider audience.

news.headline: N-able, Inc. wins 3 Comparably Awards: Best Company Outlook (3-timer), Best Company for Women (3-timer), Best Company for Diversity (2-timer).
news.summary: BURLINGTON, Mass.--N-able, Inc. (NYSE: NABL), a worldwide software firm aiding IT service providers in offering security, data protection as-a-service, and unified endpoint management solutions, is pleased to reveal its recent achievement of three esteemed awards from Comparably. These awards include Best Company Outlook (won thrice), Best Company for Women (won thrice), and Best Company for Diversity (won twice). The recognition is based on employee feedback, highlighting the positive workplace environment and organizational values.

news.headline: FreightVana appoints Mike Riccio as Chairman of the Board in the transportation and logistics industry.
news.summary: FreightVana, a prominent player in transportation and logistics, recently disclosed the selection of Mike Riccio as the Chairman of the Board in Phoenix. This marks a significant milestone in the company's growth trajectory.

news.headline: Calfrac's Q4 2024 financial results revealed in press release, available on SEDAR+ website, in Canadian dollars.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 13, 2025, Calfrac Well Services Ltd. (TSX: CFW) released its financial and operational outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. It is advised to review the accompanying management’s discussion and analysis alongside the annual consolidated financial statements and notes for December 31, 2024.
